hero.name: Muntasir Anik
hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.description: Turning ideas into innovative web applications.

bio: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable enterprise applications, specializing in NestJS, TypeScript, .NET, SQL, and RESTful APIs. Experienced in developing ERP, POS, Inventory Management, HR, and Recruitment solutions that improve business efficiency and user experience

Passionate about solving real-world business challenges through technology, I build efficient and scalable applications that drive operational excellence. Currently serving as a Software Engineer at NeosCoder, with previous experience at Akij Venture Group.

publication.title: Banking Software Services: Current Status, Challenges, Impact and Prospects
publication.about: The rapid growth of financial technology is forcing banks to adopt or upgrade core banking systems to stay competitive, efficient, and compliant. However, many banks in Bangladesh struggle with these implementations due to various challenges. This study explores those challenges and highlights their impacts, aiming to identify how local software companies can support banks in overcoming these issues and advancing digital transformation in the banking sector.
